exceptions.rationale: The latest stable Next.js release available during implementation is still 16.2.6, and npm audit only offers an unsafe semver-major downgrade path to next 9.3.3.
exceptions.upgrade_trigger: Remove this exception as soon as a stable Next.js release ships with nested postcss >= 8.5.10 and npm audit --omit=dev no longer reports GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93.
